params.CostDesc: Exile any number of historic cards from your graveyard with total mana value 30 or greater:
params.Name: Emblem — The Capitoline Triad
params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control have base power and toughness 9/9."

remaining_params.CostDesc: Exile any number of historic cards from your graveyard with total mana value 30 or greater:
remaining_params.Name: Emblem — The Capitoline Triad
remaining_params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control have base power and toughness 9/9."

params.Description: Those Who Came Before — This spell costs {1} less to cast for each historic card in your graveyard. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)
